title: AI YouTube Is Only Claude Hype Now
summary: Cole Medin critiques the oversaturation of YouTube content focused on Claude announcements and hype, arguing that the market has become repetitive with dozens of channels covering the same material. In response, he is shifting his channel strategy to focus on building real systems and showcasing engineering work with Claude Code and other coding agents, rather than reacting to every product announcement.
